overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a misty forest environment. The character travels from a mountain overlook down to a lakeside path, briefly accompanied by an NPC in a red cloak, then continues through a gated forest area into open meadows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path toward distant mountain vista

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the path
snow-capped mountains visible through the forest canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through a dense pine forest with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. The path is surrounded by tall evergreen trees with misty atmospheric lighting.

events.description: forest opens to reveal lake on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along lakeside path following an NPC companion

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path wearing red cloak and wide-brimmed hat

entered.detail: calm lake water visible through the trees on the left side

segments.scene_description: The forest opens to reveal a lake on the left as Geralt follows an NPC in a red cloak along the dirt path. The mountain vista fades behind as the path continues along the water's edge with dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with wooden gate and fencing

events.description: entering shaded area with wooden gate structure and rough fencing
lighting darkens significantly under dense tree canopy

agents.ego_description: passing through wooden gate structure into darker forested area

notable_agents.action: walking ahead into the trees before exiting view

entered.detail: tall wooden posts marking entrance to fenced forest area
rough wooden plank fence lining the right side of the path
small water pool visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a wooden gate into a darker, enclosed forest area with fencing on the right. The lighting drops significantly under the dense canopy as the NPC companion walks ahead and disappears from view.

events.description: exiting shaded gate area into brighter open meadow

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassy meadow surrounded by scattered pines

entered.detail: tall grass covering the forest floor along the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the shaded gate area into a brighter forest meadow with tall grass and scattered trees. The path continues through the open woodland as the environment gradually transitions to more open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty pine forest that gradually opens into a bright, airy woodland meadow. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail flanked by tall evergreens, with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance under atmospheric light. As the forest opens, the camera follows Geralt and a red-cloaked companion along a lakeside path where the mountain vista fades and dappled sunlight hits the water's edge. The scene then shifts into a darker, enclosed area as they pass through a wooden gate, with the lighting dropping significantly under a dense canopy until the companion disappears from view. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a bright forest meadow filled with tall grass and scattered trees as the terrain opens up into a wide woodland landscape.
